title: avenula sulcata subsp. albinervis
intro: Avenula sulcata subsp. albinervis, also known as silky hair oat-grass, is a subspecies of flowering plant that belongs to the grass family Poaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Avenula sulcata subsp. albinervis include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant are often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed internally to support overall health and well-being.
